args: u32(){ od -An -tu4 -N4 -j "$1" enc.db | tr -d " "; }; u8(){ od -An -tu1 -N1 -j "$1" enc.db | tr -d " "; }; off=8; uc=$(u32 $off); off=$((off+4)); i=0; while [ $i -lt $uc ]; do l=$(u32 $off); off=$((off+4+l+16)); vl=$(u32 $off); off=$((off+4+vl)); i=$((i+1)); done; users_end=$off; fc=$(u32 $off); off=$((off+4)); rec1=$off; ol=$(u32 $off); off=$((off+4+ol)); nl=$(u32 $off); off=$((off+4+nl)); flagpos=$off; flag=$(u8 $off); off=$((off+1)); if [ "$flag" = "1" ]; then off=$((off+24)); cl=$(u32 $off); off=$((off+4+cl)); fi; { dd if=enc.db bs=1 count=$users_end 2>/dev/null; printf "\002\000\000\000"; dd if=enc.db bs=1 skip=$rec1 count=$((flagpos-rec1)) 2>/dev/null; printf "\000"; dd if=enc.db bs=1 skip=$off 2>/dev/null; } > enc.new && mv enc.new enc.db
